name: Kirisame Co.
description: A creative brand guided by "Lunar Recitation Aesthetics", providing editorial and design support for the ESAP Project.

content.content: Founded in 2017, Kirisame Co. is a creative brand built around the philosophy of "Lunar Recitation Aesthetics." Through design deconstruction and visual philosophy, Kirisame pursues restrained yet expressive forms of communication.
Kirisame Co. provides the following support to the ESAP Project:

items: Editorial review & story feedback — proofreading and suggestions for worldbuilding narratives
UI design consultation — advocating for restrained interactions, avoiding excessive animation and visual noise
